claims.claim_text: Example Corp Ltd is registered at Road Town, Tortola, British Virgin Islands, incorporated on 2019-03-14 with registration number 2019-ABC-123.

grounding_assessment.contradiction_search: Checked cited registry filing and searched for conflicting registration number/date references; none found in accessible sources.
grounding_assessment.assessment: The claim is directly grounded in a primary registry filing and contains no unsupported material elements.

evidence_for.description: BVI FSC filing confirms registration date, address, and number verbatim.

claims.notes: Primary source match; no contradicting evidence located.

claims.claim_text: 12 of the 43 companies connected to Acme Trust Services share the same ultimate beneficial owner.

missing_assumptions: The cited database cluster reflects one confirmed UBO rather than inferred or aggregated relationships.
grounding_assessment.contradiction_search: Checked cited secondary databases and searched for primary UBO disclosure; no primary disclosure was located.
grounding_assessment.assessment: The agent/address cluster is supported, but the single-UBO assertion remains only partially grounded without a primary record.

evidence_for.description: ICIJ Offshore Leaks and OCCRP Aleph both surface the 12-entity cluster.

claims.notes: The pattern is well-documented but UBO name isn't confirmed from a primary record (e.g. a sworn affidavit or registry disclosure). Verdict: unverified — not false, just evidence-silent on the specific UBO identity.

gaps_for_next_cycle: Primary UBO disclosure for the 12-entity cluster
Cross-reference the 12 entities against sanctions lists (OFAC, UK Treasury, EU)
